about.title: More than Rugs, a Social Project
about.description1: Alfombrados was born as a social project with a clear mission: to combine the art of tufting with community impact. Every rug we create not only decorates a space, but generates learning and employment opportunities for people in our community.
about.description2: We believe that manual art has the power to transform lives. That's why we teach, create, and share this passion with everyone who wants to learn. From our workshops to every custom piece, we seek to leave a positive footprint.

impact.description: We create jobs and opportunities in our community

reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: The satisfaction of those who trust us is our best introduction

review1.text: The quality of the rug they made for me is incredible. The design turned out exactly as I imagined and the process was super easy. Plus, knowing you're supporting a social project makes it even more worthwhile.
review1.name: María González

review2.text: I took the basic tufting course and it was a transformative experience. The instructors are very patient and the atmosphere is great. I'm already making my own rugs at home.
review2.name: Carlos Mendoza

review3.text: I've been buying materials here for months. The yarn quality is excellent and the prices are very competitive. Shipping always arrives on time.
review3.name: Ana Rodríguez
